headline: How The Investment Story For Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Is Quietly Shifting On Wall Street
summary: The latest update edges Intercontinental Exchange’s fair value estimate slightly higher, from US$196.00 to about US$196.57. This reflects a fine tuning of assumptions rather than a big shift in view. That small move sits alongside a mix of fresh target hikes, trims, and one upgrade, showing how analysts are reassessing what they think the shares are worth as they weigh execution and growth expectations. Read on to see how you can track and interpret this evolving narrative for your own...
